sentence: Undifferentiated spermatogonia profiles should map under the germ cell branch and remain distinct from differentiating spermatogonia.
Pachytene spermatocyte labels belong to the spermatocyte lineage and should not be merged into generic late meiotic cell labels unless unresolved.
Sertoli-like aliases should normalize to the canonical Sertoli cell harmonized label in testis datasets.
